error.message: Input does not meet minimum requirements for this request.

guidance.reason_title: The applicant documents are too short to analyse
guidance.reason_detail: There wasn't enough financial content in the submitted documents to produce a meaningful credit profile.
guidance.reason_detail_tr: Gönderilen belgeler, anlamlı bir kredi profili oluşturmak için yeterli finansal içerik içermiyor.
guidance.next_step: Paste the full financial statements, bank statements, or management accounts — include figures, dates, and at least one full reporting period.

meta.reason_human: There wasn't enough financial content in the submitted documents to produce a meaningful credit profile.

next_action.reason_human: This request could not be completed as submitted. Please revise the input and try again with clearer or more complete information.
